ModMetaData.name: Give Back My F****** Mechanoids
ModMetaData.author: HappyWindinkg
ModMetaData.description: Something broke my fricking mech gestator. The mech just wouldn't come out, and the poor pawn stood there like an idiot, waiting forever. So I asked ChatGPT for help, and boom — the patch did the trick. If this sounds familiar, maybe this mod can save your sanity too.
